sections.description: Auto-generate barcodes, design label templates, manage a print queue, and add products in seconds with the mobile Quick Add workflow.
sections.changelog:
1.0.1

  • Fixed barcode live preview in product metabox (EAN field now updates preview as you type).
  • Fixed Add to Print Queue buttons on product list and product edit page.
  • Fixed bulk action Add to Print Queue.
  • Added A4, A5, and Legal paper size options for label printing.
  • Added A4 65-up and A4 24-up label presets.
  • Self-hosted auto-update mechanism added.

1.0.0

  • Initial release.
